UD JURY TRIALS

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-19-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Bruce Burge is present in Pro Per.
Defendant Shuun Caldwell is present.
Attorney Andrew P. McDevitt and Valerie N. Rose representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Niles Rosenquest, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of APR-23-2012 is vacated. (501/JPT)
